sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Demand is decelerating, indicating a moderate headwind.

evidence.text: Total average revenue per piece decreased 0.5% in the second quarter of 2019 (0.8% year-to-date) compared to 2018. Total average revenue per piece was impacted by a 240 basis point decrease for the quarter (290 basis point decrease year-to-date) from currency, partially offset by an increase in fuel surcharge indices.

evidence.text: Export volume for the quarter and year-to-date periods was strongest in our non-premium expedited and standard products such as Worldwide Expedited and Domestic Standard, offset by declines in our premium Worldwide Express service.
